scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/contract && tsc --noEmit -p packages/log && tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/platform-mock && tsc --noEmit -p packages/simulator && tsc --noEmit -p packages/adapter-kit && tsc --noEmit -p packages/adapter-test-kit && tsc --noEmit -p packages/client
